name: signal
description: Mailchimp contact enrichment — on-demand in chat, ambient via overnight brief.

mcp_url.title: Signal MCP URL
mcp_url.description: Your per-user Signal MCP URL. Open https://signal-lilac-six.vercel.app/, sign in with Mailchimp (Gmail optional), then reveal & copy your MCP URL from the dashboard. Format: https://<worker-host>/mcp/<bearer-token>
